{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Nuren group
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Nuren group]] is led by an older human man with a large scar across one eye.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c43">''The Engineer'', chapter 43</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
